rows.label: tev056501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev056501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Muimui about the Growth.

rows.label: tev056501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev056501_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Muimui if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev056501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Muimui about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056501_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Muimui about Primordial Wilderness.

rows.label: tev056501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Muimui if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev056501_SEL2011
rows.name: Ask Muimui about Valley of Oblivion.

rows.label: tev056501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Muimui about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056501_SEL3011
rows.name: Ask Muimui about White Woods.

rows.label: tev056501_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Muimui about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Growth is wreaking havoc all over Mira.
Many Nopon friends have been eaten![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0002
rows.name:
All this terror really puts kibosh on business.
Nopon cannot travel. Nopon cannot sell things.
And this mean Nopon cannot eat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0003
rows.name:
If not for human friends, all
Nopon might have gone extinct.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thank you, friend! Muimui is ready
to work tuft off in city to make
fortune and recoup losses.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Unfair! Little brotherpon of Muimui,
Moimoi, invented all kinds of really
useful machines for human friends![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0010
rows.name:
Who can live without pollen-orb radar, mmm? And tuft
fluffer VERY important before night on town! But
human friends not buy any of these wonder devices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Soon Muimui and Moimoi will go
out of business and have to find
landfill to dispose of surplus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Does friend have any other get-rich-quick
ideas? ...Or better yet, will friend
purchase tuft fluffer in bulk?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Guess what? Muimui and Moimoi
joined BLADE as Collepedian![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0018
rows.name:
Little brotherpon Moimoi invented
amazing gadget called Legen-dar
to make work go faster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Once Legen-dar is done, Muimui and
Moimoi will head out, find haul
of goodies, and rake in cash![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG0020
rows.name:
Friend is also BLADE, right?
So friend should make every
effort to help Team Muimui out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG1001
rows.name:
Muimui found thingy you call "meditation
powder" on third terrane of Talon Rock.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG1002
rows.name:
And on way home, Muimui passed
through West Janpath Plain and
saw assassin springtails.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG1003
rows.name:
Muimui has been VERY busy establishing self
as top-shelf Collepedian for BLADE. Friend
should be both surprised and impressed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG1004
rows.name:
And since Muimui was nice enough to share
secret information, friend should give major
discount next time Muimui needs help![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG1009
rows.name:
All that work, and Muimui wind up with
nothing but legendary toy sword...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG1010
rows.name:
Mighty tuft of Muimui may
never stand tall again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG1011
rows.name:
If Muimui ever cheers up, there might be new
quest to find real Sword of Legendaryness.
But Muimui need alone time right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG2001
rows.name:
Muimui was searching Twin Arches
in Valley of Oblivion when Muimui
stumbled on magical finding rod![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG2002
rows.name:
And when Muimui tried dowsing with finding
rod, it showed cavern that contains ancient
Nopon treasure called "nopolith."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG2003
rows.name:
Still no sign of Sword of Legendaryness,
but Muimui is proud of major breakthroughs
as BLADE Collepedian.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG2004
rows.name:
Friend can say nice things about Muimui now.
Although major discount when friend does jobs
for Muimui would be more appreciated...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG2009
rows.name:
Muimui and Moimoi are hard at
work planning next grand adventure.
This time it will work out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG2010
rows.name:
Radar picked up some super legendary
waves coming from White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG2011
rows.name:
Muimui will tell friend when time is right.
In meantime, friend should train hard and
make own preparations for adventure.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3001
rows.name:
Muimui has been very busy again. Located
mega rare item called penginion while
passing Delusians South Summit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3002
rows.name:
Oh, and Muimui also found rare
insect called snowy angelhair
while swimming in Lake Ciel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3003
rows.name:
Muimui turning into total ace Collepedian
these days. Finding pretty much everything
under sun EXCEPT Sword of Legendaryness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3004
rows.name:
But just thinking about how many
animals and insects Muimui must
find to keep food on table... Meh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3009
rows.name:
Muimui was all ready to teach Moimoi lesson,
but Moimoi manage to strike first due to
increasingly empty stomach of Muimui.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3010
rows.name:
Only way to put bratty little brotherpon
in place now is to eat—and to eat, Muimui
must work extra hard as BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3011
rows.name:
*sigh* If only someone would send Muimui on
completely safe mission to catch ball
mosquitoes and earn 100,000 credits a pop...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3012
rows.name:
Instead Muimui keeps having to
go up against dangerous monsters
and terrifying terrain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056501_MSG3013
rows.name:
Muimui really need to quit BLADE
and find way to make money
without slowly killing self.[ST:wait ]
